footer.tagline: Furniture of excellence, crafted with passion.

about.title: About Arvesta
about.desc: Premium furniture manufacturer based in Aksaray, Turkey.
about.heroDesc: From our workshops in Aksaray, we craft pieces that last generations. No mass production. No compromises. Every piece of furniture carries the signature of hands that understand wood.
about.storyP1: Arvesta was born from a simple belief: exceptional furniture shouldn't be reserved for the few. Our roots run deep in the artisan tradition of Aksaray, where woodworking is a heritage passed from father to son.
about.storyP2: Today, we marry this ancestral craftsmanship with the elegance of French design. Each piece is conceived in Paris and shaped in Turkey, in workshops where precision isn't a goal — it's a habit.
about.craft1Desc: Solid wood, natural veneers, European hardware. We select every component as if it were for our own home.
about.craft2Desc: Latest-generation CNC machines guided by experienced artisans. Technology in service of the hand.
about.craft3Desc: From design to installation, one point of contact. We deliver and assemble across Europe.
about.ctaDesc: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision.
